self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Byakuya Kougetsu (R1): Normal Attack DMG is increased by an amount equal to 1% of the wielder's Max HP. Approximated as a flat +300 Normal Attack DMG, assuming ~30,000 Max HP (no eval-time HP-to-flat-dmg conversion key exists). Healing Bonus +10% and the post-Burst Normal Attack Energy restoration are not modeled (non-combat/utility).
